objective: 產品問題衝刺: 修復 1 個 REPLAN_REQUIRED 任務的交付問題
task_draft_markdown:
產品問題衝刺: 修復 1 個 REPLAN_REQUIRED 任務的交付問題

User Value: Workers are producing incomplete deliveries that fail the quality gate. 1 tasks (IDs: [181]) are stuck. Until fixed, the orchestrator cannot make forward progress.

Product Maturity Impact: A quality gate that rejects all deliveries signals a calibration mismatch between what the gate expects and what workers produce. Fixing this unblocks the entire sprint pipeline.

Expected Change: REPLAN_REQUIRED count drops to 0. The quality gate only rejects genuinely incomplete work, not well-intentioned structural deliveries.

Objective: Investigate why the quality gate is rejecting these 1 tasks. Sample rejection reason: "Missing required outputs: completed_markdown". Fix either the gate calibration or the worker output format so that structured deliveries pass.

Phase 1: Read the completed.md for each REPLAN_REQUIRED task. Identify the exact pattern causing rejection (placeholder text, short content, etc.).
Phase 2: Update the worker completion template in worker_tick.py to generate substantive evidence rather than HTML comment placeholders.
Phase 3: For each stuck task, rewrite completed.md with real evidence from the contract fields (user_value, product_maturity_impact, expected_change).
Phase 4: Reset stuck tasks to QUEUED. Run worker ticks. Verify all pass GATE_PASS.

Scope: backend/app/orchestrator/worker_tick.py, backend/app/orchestrator/task_result_quality_gate.py, runtime/agent_orchestrator/tasks/
Acceptance Criteria: All REPLAN_REQUIRED tasks resolve to COMPLETED; new tasks generated by worker_tick no longer contain HTML comment placeholders; make backend-test passes.
focus_keys: quality_gate, replan, worker_delivery, gate_calibration
expected_duration_minutes: 120
user_value: Workers are producing incomplete deliveries that fail the quality gate. 1 tasks (IDs: [181]) are stuck. Until fixed, the orchestrator cannot make forward progress.
product_maturity_impact: A quality gate that rejects all deliveries signals a calibration mismatch between what the gate expects and what workers produce. Fixing this unblocks the entire sprint pipeline.
expected_change: REPLAN_REQUIRED count drops to 0. The quality gate only rejects genuinely incomplete work, not well-intentioned structural deliveries.
scope: Complete the smallest meaningful increment toward the objective.
Leave machine-readable artifacts for orchestrator validation.
constraints: Do not claim acceptance without evidence.
禁止在任何輸出中包含以下詞句："SIGNAL_EXHAUSTED", "NO_SIGNAL", "停止建議", "目前沒有方向"。每個 Focus 必須有獨立的量化結論。
handoff_questions: What is the next highest-priority backlog item after this task?
Did the worker leave any unresolved risk that needs a replan?
How should planner handle follow-up for task #182?
